query:
SELECT id, full_name, instagram_handle, team, payment_status FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE full_name LIKE '%Queen%' OR full_name LIKE '%Slew%'
   OR full_name LIKE '%Chigz%' OR full_name LIKE '%Axel%'
   OR full_name LIKE '%Verity%' OR full_name LIKE '%Henry%'
   OR full_name LIKE '%Nahal%' OR full_name LIKE '%George%'
ORDER BY full_name;
